input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.9.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.9.3
            TITLE: any part which is normally purchased that is optionally shown as a made part must have

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.9.3: Any part which is normally purchased that is optionally shown as a Made part must have
S.3.9.3 Any part which is normally purchased that is optionally shown as a Made part must have 
supporting documentation submitted to prove team manufacture.

final_answer: rule S.3.9.3: Any part which is normally purchased that is optionally shown as a Made part must have supporting documentation submitted to prove team manufacture.
